# Rismon.ai

> Rismon.ai scans AI-built apps and finds gaps between what a founder meant to build and what was actually built. Plain-English findings, file-and-line proof, copy-paste fix prompts for Lovable, Bolt, Cursor, and other AI coding tools.

Rismon connects to a GitHub repo, reads the live landing page to extract product promises, asks the founder a few smart questions about intent, then cross-references promises against the actual codebase. The output is an intent-match score (0–100), a list of business-logic gaps, security findings verified by two independent AI models (Claude and Gemini), and ready-to-paste fix prompts. Built for non-technical founders.

## Pages

- [Home](/): What Rismon does, how the scan works, pricing, FAQ.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free plan (3 scans/week) and Try Pro ($14.99 one-time deep scan).
- [Sample report](/sample-report): A real Rismon report so you can see the output before signing up.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on AI-built app safety, intent verification, and shipping with no-code tools.
- [About](/about): Who built Rismon and why.
- [Security](/security): How Rismon handles your code and tokens (read-only, in-memory, never stored).
- [Open source](/open-source): The Rismon codebase on GitHub.
- [Contact](/contact): Email and other ways to reach the team.
- [Status](/status): Live uptime and incident history.

## For platforms

- [For Lovable](/for/lovable): Rismon for apps built with Lovable.
- [For Bolt](/for/bolt): Rismon for apps built with Bolt.
- [For Cursor](/for/cursor): Rismon for apps built with Cursor.
